notes: A game audio mixing-bus graph (R-SYS-006): a master bus that sfx, music, and voice fold into, with an ambient sub-bus under sfx. Each bus scales the sound routed to it (linear gain) and mixes into its parent. The presentation-observer audio package (src/packages/audio/) routes ctx:audio-event sounds through these buses off the deterministic sim path (R-SIM-001). This is the authored ctx:audio-bus few-shot form an AI author should emit.
